Chart No 76.—Born on 12-2-1856 at about 12-21 p.m.
(L.M.T.) (Lat. 18° N., Long. 84° E.)
Balance of Venus Dasa at birth : Years 12-3-9.
The Fourth House.—The fourth house is Leo. It is
occupied by no planet. Saturn, Sun, Mercury and Jupiter
aspect the fourth house. The Sun as lord of the fourth and
Mercury as lord of the seeond and fifth aspecting the fourth
house have fortified the house considerably.

Concerning the Fourth House 187
Yogakaraka Saturn's aspect is equally important. Hence the
fourth house is rendered quite strong.
The Fourth Lord.—The Sun is the fourth lord. He is in
the tenth, in association with Mercury and Jupiter, owning
the 2nd and 5th and 8th and 11th respectively. The Sun
aspects the fourth house. Mercury's association with the
fourth lord is highly significant.
Vidyakaraka.—Jupiter, the Vidyakaraka, aspects
vidyasthana (fourth) and is well fortified but for his
